ExtensionMethodsHandleGetCustomEntitiesT Method (IMethod, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskIEnumerableT)

One Identity Manager API Server
Defines a method for a GET handler that returns custom-defined entities.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static ICustomEntityMethod<T> HandleGetCustomEntities<T>(
	this IMethod method,
	Func<IRequest, CancellationToken, Task<IEnumerable<T>>> factory
)
where T : ICustomEntityDescriptor

Parameters

method
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionIMethod
Base method
factory
Type: SystemFuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskIEnumerableT
Asynchronous function that returns entity descriptors for a given request

Type Parameters

T

Return Value

Type: ICustomEntityMethodT

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IMethod. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
